M
Finance AI · Categories
High confidenceLedgerLast sync: today 06:14
Climbing
COGS has crept from 14% to 19.7% of revenue in 3 months
Supplier prices rose without a matching price increase on your side. Each point of COGS is ~$4.5K/mo at current revenue — this is quietly eating margin.
Fastest-growing
Marketing is up 17.9% this month
The seasonal push raised spend, but as a share of revenue it's holding at 7.3% — within range. Worth watching that it converts, not just rises.
Cleanup
$3,200 across 14 transactions uncategorized
Mostly small recurring charges Magellan couldn't auto-classify. Categorizing them sharpens every number on this page.
By category — spend, trend, and whether it’s healthy
COGS
Variable
$89,400412 transactions
19.7% now, up from 14% three months ago — climbing steadily.
Payroll & people
Fixed
$45,00018 transactions
9.9% now, flat over 6 months — scaling with revenue, not ahead of it.
Marketing & ads
Variable
$33,00096 transactions
7.3% now, steady — dollars rose with the push but the share held.
Rent & utilities
Fixed
$21,0007 transactions
4.6% now, down from 5.6% — fixed cost diluting as revenue grows. Healthy.
Delivery & logistics
Variable
$12,400203 transactions
2.7% now, edging up from 2.4% — small, but worth watching as volume grows.
Software & tools
Fixed
$4,80022 transactions
1.1% now, creeping up — a few plan upgrades. Check for zero-usage tools.
iEach category is judged against its own history, not an industry average — a cost climbing against where it used to sit is the signal that matters. The percentages and trends here are measured from your ledger.
Ask Magellan anything…
